data-definition:
bay12: JRE_JOB_DETAILS_FLAG_*
-- Custom:
bay12: JobRoleTypes
bay12: JOBITEMFLAG_*
-- Unused: Spells
bay12: JobType -- Declare attributes:
-- 0
-- 12
-- 22
-- 32
-- 40
-- 48
-- 58
-- 68
-- 79
-- 89
-- 99
-- 109
-- 119
-- 128
-- 138
-- 149
-- 158
-- 168
-- 178
-- 188
-- 198
-- 208
-- 218
-- 228
-- 238
bay12: JOBFLAG_*
When actually carrying non-last item to the workshop. If last, 'working' is used instead.
--
bay12: KillJobExceptionType
-- Unused: JobNukeRefType
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_CONSTRUCT_BUILDING_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_CLEAN_PATIENT_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_CLEAN_SELF_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_PLACE_TRACK_VEHICLE_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_GATHER_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_DRINK_ITEM_*
bay12: JOB_SPEC_FLAG_INTERROGATION_*
-- Helper type for job.specflag
bay12: N/A
bay12: N/A no bay12 equivalent in headers; existence -- but not function -- determined by rev eng
-- Helper type for job.spec_id
bay12: JobStageType
bay12: tlink{jobst}
$.job_type
not a compound
bay12: JOB_POSTING_FLAG_*
